candidate.description: Mapping from terms to lists of document IDs containing them; the core data structure for full-text search.

candidates_full.full_description: Posting-list data structure mapping terms to document IDs and positions; core of search engines like Lucene. Distinct from B-tree indexes which are sorted on key prefixes.
Balanced-tree index used as the default in most relational databases; supports point and range queries on sorted keys.
